name: Red Bean, Rice and Sausage Soup
recipeIngredient: 2 cans Red kidney beans, canned, (16 ounces)
6 oz Sausage, sliced into 1/4-inch thick pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a Dutch oven or small soup pot, combine onion, garlic, olive oil, and 3 tablespoons of chicken broth. Cook over medium heat, stirring frequently, until onions begin to brown, about 5-6 minutes.
2. Add all remaining ingredients except sausage. Bring soup to a boil over high heat.
3. Lower the heat and cover. Simmer, stirring occasionally, for about 20 minutes.
4. Add sausage and cook an additional 10 minutes or until flavors are well blended and soup has thickened slightly.
5. Keep refrigerated for up to 3-4 days.
